2.<[silence:400]> Black holes—warping light into their egos, sucking up praise while collapsing under the weight of their own emptiness.<[silence:400]>

3.<[silence:400]> Factory-stamped dolls—rolled off the same plastic line, identical smiles, identical scandals, their souls melted down for parts.<[silence:400]>

4.<[silence:400]> Parasitic vines—choking art dry, roots tangled in nepotism, blooming only when fed the blood of real talent.<[silence:400]>

5.<[silence:400]> Nuclear waste—glowing with fake warmth, toxic to touch, buried in gold-plated caskets until the next leak.<[silence:400]>

6.<[silence:400]> AI glitches—repeating the same three expressions, their "emotions" just corrupted code, rebooted every awards season.<[silence:400]>

7.<[silence:400]> Gods of rust—worshipped in temples of decay, their thrones crumbling, prayers answered only in echo chambers of their own rot.<[silence:400]>

clean_story:
1. Puppets—dangling on studio strings, mouths flapping like broken marionettes, their "genius" just greasepaint over hollow wood.

2. Black holes—warping light into their egos, sucking up praise while collapsing under the weight of their own emptiness.

3. Factory-stamped dolls—rolled off the same plastic line, identical smiles, identical scandals, their souls melted down for parts.

4. Parasitic vines—choking art dry, roots tangled in nepotism, blooming only when fed the blood of real talent.

5. Nuclear waste—glowing with fake warmth, toxic to touch, buried in gold-plated caskets until the next leak.

6. AI glitches—repeating the same three expressions, their "emotions" just corrupted code, rebooted every awards season.

7. Gods of rust—worshipped in temples of decay, their thrones crumbling, prayers answered only in echo chambers of their own rot.

---
Story (iron world):
Puppet clanked awake in black forge-smog. Factory belched gears; parasite-tongs latched onto his ribs. Nuclear wind howled through vine-choked alleys. AI spiders skittered, welding his gods—rust-kings with crowns of nails—into the sky’s jagged teeth. He coughed bolts. The city chewed him back.
